name: Market
shortDescription: Launch a peer-to-peer marketplace with on-chain escrow inside your guild.
longDescription: The Marketplace module enables guilds to create their own trading hub. Members can list, browse, and trade NFTs and digital assets securely using on-chain escrow. Guilds define which collections can be traded and which tokens function as store currency.
detailedDescription: Marketplace configuration includes approved NFT collections, accepted SPL tokens, currency tokens for royalties and store fees, optional gate gating, and monetization options on the Pro tier. Transactions are secured via decentralized escrow logic. Pricing: Base – 19 USDC/month with 5 mints and base currencies (SOL, USDC, USDT, WBTC); Grow – 29 USDC/month with 50 mints and 1 custom currency; Pro – 39 USDC/month with 250 mints, 2 custom currencies, and enabled marketplace fees. Add-ons: 5 USDC/month per 50 additional mints and 5 USDC/month per custom currency.

activationInstructions.intro: Raise your merchant banners. Open your gates to trade.
